ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the election */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the election */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the election is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "city_website" TEXT /* Official website of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the ward is located */,
  "ward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ward */,
  "ward_population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the precinct */,
  "polling_location" TEXT /* Location of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting data entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election this data corresponds to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "votes_yes" INTEGER /* Number of votes in favor */,
  "votes_no" INTEGER /* Number of votes against */,
  "blanks" INTEGER /* Number of blank votes */,
  "turnout_rate" TEXT /* Turnout rate of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate participated in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, observer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the official is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result corresponds to */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast in the election */,
  "turnout_rate" TEXT /* Turnout rate of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
